{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324014645C890828EA3614D01290B"}"},"total":7777},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7224504102856000296","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说真的很不错，番茄待了快一年了，从一开始疯狂看到后来兴致缺缺，十几章就退。这是第一本在番茄大后期能看完的，他还没完结！！啊啊啊关键后边应该还差不少内容，啥时候能刷刷刷一天十更！！
作者的配图也特别贴切，喜欢这种小说配图！！满足想象力！而且作者应该经常看评论，前期有些地方一出来大家反应挺大，没过太多章就解决了，真的太爽了，完美！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682086024,"group_id":"7152305302254128142","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"今天的事再大，到明天都是小事。今年的事再大，到明年都是故事。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz5aOJ6IbLZo+fQclkbl3BAT5kGpU40edQVjnOkZj7nJ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/310eade3e5194421851455ebebfb4562~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874867&x-signature=jtqfb9jdNttvBMTWE0Kqj7y%2FOGk%3D","user_id":"1398997070121800","user_name":"没必要给没必要的人说"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1398997070121800","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776103206,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7152305302254128142","book_info":{"abstract":"神秘游戏——【诸天万界】出现，世界即将被彻底颠覆。
  当苏白进入游戏后，一个令得诸天万界，牛鬼蛇神闻风丧胆的“盖世大魔王”就此诞生！
